notes.post_text:
🚨 BREAKING:   Christian Eriksen is dead at the hospital after collapsing on the pitch during the Denmark vs Ukraine game. RIP.
Prayers for his family. 🙏   @marca https://t.co/eEOnMbyRyv
notes.note_text: PolitiFact rated this False. Eriksen collapsed during Denmark vs. Finland, not Ukraine, and was reported stable at the hospital after suffering cardiac arrest. https://www.politifact.com/factchecks/2021/jun/14/instagram-posts/christian-eriksen-danish-soccer-player-who-collaps/

notes.post_text: Apple announces iOS 27 will require a monthly subscription of $1.99 to use iMessage. https://t.co/4nLpNyqFOf
notes.note_text: PolitiFact rated a similar claim False. Apple does not charge for FaceTime and has not announced plans to start charging users for its messaging features. https://www.politifact.com/factchecks/2024/jun/17/threads-posts/apple-has-not-announced-plans-to-charge-facetime-u/

notes.post_text: California made it illegal to show or request photo ID to vote. You cannot show your photo ID even voluntarily! https://t.co/1afSUV2d2j
notes.note_text: PolitiFact rated this False. SB 1174 bars local governments from requiring voter ID at polling places; it does not ban voluntarily showing ID. https://www.politifact.com/factchecks/2024/aug/30/instagram-posts/a-new-california-bill-wont-eliminate-voter-id-at-p/

notes.post_text: Just a reminder: You may notice gas prices inching down a bit. They’re now increasing the level of ethanol they put into our gasoline from 10% to 15%. Started May 1. This is really bad for our cars and will cause damage to our car’s fuel system due to corrosion.
notes.note_text: PolitiFact rated a similar claim Mostly False. The EPA says E15 is safe for cars, trucks and SUVs made in 2001 or later, which covers over 90% of U.S. vehicles. https://www.politifact.com/factchecks/2022/apr/18/facebook-posts/e15-fuel-does-not-pose-danger-vast-majority-vehicl/

notes.post_text: Never forget that in 2003 Keir Starmer won the case that gave illegal migrants access to UK benefits. Twenty three years later, we're living in the chaos he created. https://t.co/0YbNjroAbQ
notes.note_text: Full Fact rated this misleading. The 2003 case Starmer was involved in concerned whether asylum seekers who didn't claim asylum immediately on entry could access accommodation or financial support. https://fullfact.org/immigration/starmer-2003-court-case-asylum-benefits/
notes.evidence_rating: This is misleading. Mr Starmer was involved in a 2003 court case that specifically concerned whether asylum seekers who didn't claim asylum as soon as they entered the UK could get help from the government in the form of accommodation or financial support. Most asylum seekers could already receive accommodation and financial support before this case.

notes.post_text: Footage of he American cargo vessel "Arista" in the Strait of Hormuz, seized by the IRGC for violating maritime transit laws and regulations, according to Iranian authorities. https://t.co/msNqvxkEE3
notes.note_text: PolitiFact rated this False. The footage is from June 2025 and shows the aftermath of a collision between two oil tankers near the Strait of Hormuz, not an IRGC seizure. https://www.politifact.com/factchecks/2026/apr/20/social-media/old-video-us-attack-iran-ship/

notes.post_text:
🚨JUST IN: Canada just criminalized the Bible. Bill C-9 has passed the Senate, removing key religious protections and opening the door for Scripture to be treated as “hate speech.”

Quoting the Bible on marriage, sin, or God’s design for sexuality can now lead to prosecution for https://t.co/28vVklrrsg
notes.note_text: AFP Fact Check rated this misleading. Bill C-9 reforms hate speech laws in Canada but does not criminalize the Bible or religious teaching on marriage or sexuality. https://factcheck.afp.com/doc.afp.com.A6Q23G6
